hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'DROP '*|*'drop '*|*'TRUNCATE '*|*'truncate '*|*'DELETE FROM'*|*'delete from'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive SQL operation detected. Use a migration instead.' >&2; exit 2;; *'rm -rf'*|*'rm -r /'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Recursive delete on root or broad path. Be more specific.' >&2; exit 2;; *'--force'*|*'--hard'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Force/hard operation detected. Confirm with user first.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
